characters.name: Private Arthur Hamp
characters.description: A simplistic young soldier from Lancashire, who, under extreme stress, deserts.

characters.name: Lieutenant William Hargreaves
characters.description: A well-educated officer from Lancashire tasked with the defence of Hamp.

characters.name: Lieutenant Tom Webb
characters.description: Another Lancashire officer with a much more black-and-white view of the affair. Close friend of Hargreaves.

characters.name: Prosecuting Officer Midgley
characters.description: Appointed to the prosecution of Hamp, sees Hargreaves’ efforts as a waste of time and resources.

characters.name: Padre
characters.description: The Chaplain of the regiment who gives spiritual advice to both Hamp and Hargreaves and testimony for defence.

characters.name: Guard Corporal
characters.description: A sympathetic soldier tasked with Hamp’s care.

characters.name: Guard Private
characters.description: direct subordinate to Corporal tasked with the same.

characters.name: Medical Officer
characters.description: An overstressed doctor who previously treated Hamp for ‘Nerves’.
